word: G4692 - σπεύδω - speúdō - spyoo'-do - Haste unto

sections.paragraph:
- Original: σπεύδω

- Transliteration: Speudo

- Phonetic: spyoo'-do

- Definition:

1. to haste, make haste

2. to desire earnestly

- Origin: probably strengthened from G4228

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Probably strengthened from G4228; to speed (study) that is urge on (diligently or earnestly); by implication to await eagerly: - (make with) haste unto.
